comment: Glasshouse rules metadata (plan 5e). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/glasshouse.ts.

mothLanes.comment: M-O-T-H: completion pays and resets the lamp wander clock (the moths regroup). Letters persist, lane change on the flippers.

pollen.comment: POLLEN COUNT: roll all four return lanes (two per side, the widebody's double inlanes) to step the bonus multiplier, light THE MISTER and open the cross-pollination window.

lamps.comment: Phototaxis: one maintenance lamp is lit at a time and wanders on a timer; hits at the lit lamp pay double and bank a moth.

vine.comment: THE VINE RUN (lateral surface): a completed west-to-east ride pays CANOPY; landing while the pollen window is fresh pays CROSS-POLLINATION.

bloom.comment: The 5-bank: each completion opens one bloom (tracked across balls); five = FULL BED, arming the wizard qualifier.

orchid.comment: Scoop ladder (wrapping); the top rung starts LIGHTS OUT (video mode: call the moonlit pane). Every capture lights the cold frame.

lightsOut.comment: Video mode (holdScoop + timer, sim-safe): the lamps fail one by one; each cue the flippers call the moonlit pane. All right = a moth joins the swarm.

swarm.comment: Banked moths release as multiball: addBalls extras, timed frenzy; hits at the lit (still wandering) lamp pay jackpots.

century.comment: Wizard: FULL BED + one swarm + one cross-pollination light the Orchid; the century plant flowers once - every lamp on, all scores doubled.

skill.comment: NIGHT SHIFT: a soft plunge peaking in the sensor-skill-nightshift band (fires at <= maxSpeed m/s) pays points and banks a moth. Once per ball.
